case_title: CITY & COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR/TREASURER VS. JOSEPH Q TRIUNFANTE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR/TREASURER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIUNFANTE, JOSEPH Q $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
